content: ### Engineering intelligent automation systems — from embedded software to industrial analytics platforms.

### Automation and Software Solutions
HBT Engineering provides end-to-end automation and industrial software development services for OEMs, industrial equipment manufacturers, and digital manufacturing platforms.

Our teams support the complete technology stack — from embedded firmware and control systems to industrial software platforms, testing automation, and hardware integration . We help organizations accelerate product development, modernize industrial systems, and deploy reliable automation solutions at scale.

### Firmware & Embedded Software Development
We develop robust firmware and embedded platforms for industrial devices, controllers, and intelligent systems.

• OS support & BSP development
• Platform bring-up and hardware integration
• Device drivers and HAL development
• Embedded security implementation
• Functional safety compliance
• Performance optimization & benchmarking

HBT Engineering provides comprehensive engineering services supporting the design, development, and validation of complex industrial systems. Our multidisciplinary teams combine expertise across mechanical engineering, hydraulics, gearbox design, electrical systems, system integration, and virtual validation to deliver robust engineering solutions. These services support customers across the entire product lifecycle — from concept design to production readiness
. The company’s global engineering expertise is built on nearly 200 years of industrial engineering heritage originating from Luenen, Germany.

## Structural Engineering
Support complex machine structures and system layouts.
Capabilities
• Benchmarking and reverse engineering
• Machine configuration
• Layout optimization
• Space claim studies
• Product customization
• Stack-up analysis
• Structural validation
Engineering Tools

### System Integration Engineering
Integration of mechanical, hydraulic, and electrical subsystems into unified product architecture.
• Machine configuration and system architecture

• 2D/3D modeling and visualization
• Parametric CAD conversion

## Engineering-Driven Strategic Sourcing
Modern industrial equipment requires long lifecycle support, reliable spare parts management, and engineering continuity across multiple global locations.
At HBT Engineering India, our Product Support Services combine engineering expertise, data-driven decision making, and supply chain coordination to ensure seamless lifecycle support for complex industrial systems.
Our teams support global OEM operations through services including:

Our teams support global OEM operations through services including:
• Aftermarket lifecycle management
• Spare parts pricing and inventory optimization
• Warranty and product health analysis
• Technical documentation and publications
• SAP-enabled product support operations
These capabilities ensure higher equipment availability, better lifecycle profitability, and improved customer satisfaction.

Manage the entire lifecycle of industrial equipment and components, ensuring long-term serviceability and performance.

### Strategic sourcing
At HBT Engineering India, strategic sourcing goes beyond supplier discovery. We combine engineering expertise, supplier intelligence, and end-to-end execution ownership to build resilient and cost-efficient supply chains for complex industrial components.
With nearly 200 years of industrial heritage originating from Luenen, Germany, HBT brings deep manufacturing expertise and applies it to modern global sourcing strategies.

Our sourcing teams work closely with global customers to support:
• Cost localization initiatives
• Supplier capability assessment
• Engineering collaboration for manufacturability
• End-to-end procurement execution

### Our Strategic Sourcing Capabilities

#### Supplier Discovery & Capability Assessment
Identify and qualify suppliers based on technical capability, quality systems, and manufacturing readiness.

#### Engineering Collaboration

#### Supplier Development

Ensure suppliers meet international quality and regulatory requirements.

### Tech Documentation
Industrial equipment requires precise documentation to ensure safe operation, efficient maintenance, and compliance with global standards.
HBT Engineering transforms complex engineering information into clear, structured technical publications designed for multiple stakeholders including operators, service technicians, dealers, and product support teams.
Our documentation services support the entire product lifecycle — from product launch to long-term maintenance and service operations.

## The documentation process includes six key stages:

#### 1. Analysis
Collaborating with engineering teams and stakeholders to gather product information and documentation requirements.

#### 2. Designing
Developing templates, documentation standards, and style guides tailored to customer requirements.

#### 3. Authoring
Creating structured, accurate technical documentation aligned with engineering specifications.

#### 4. Review
Performing multi-level validation including self-checks, SME reviews, and customer approvals.

#### 5. Publishing
Delivering documentation in multiple formats such as digital manuals, print-ready documents, and online help systems.

#### 6. Maintenance
Updating documentation based on product upgrades, engineering changes, and field feedback.

## What We Serve

#### Parts Catalogues & Technical Illustrations
• Illustrated Parts Catalogues (IPC)
• 3D Parts Catalogues
• Technical Illustrations
• Interactive parts identification tools
These solutions enable faster spare parts identification and improved service efficiency.

#### Operation & Maintenance Documentation
• Operation & Maintenance Manuals (OMM)
• Owner’s manuals
• Automation documentation
• Standard work procedures
These manuals ensure safe equipment operation and standardized maintenance practices.

#### Service & Repair Documentation
• Repair procedures
• Troubleshooting guides
• Disassembly & Assembly manuals
• Reuse & Salvage documentation
• Reliability Centered Maintenance (RCM)
These documents help technicians perform accurate repairs and minimize downtime.

#### Operator & Service Information Authoring
Provide structured service content including:
• Maintenance procedures
• Service bulletins
• Field troubleshooting instructions
• Electro-hydraulic schematics
• Digital service manuals
These solutions improve operator usability and service efficiency.

#### Compliance & Safety Documentation
• Health & safety manuals
• Technical information bulletins
• Certification documentation
• Regulatory compliance documentation
These ensure products comply with industry regulations and safety standards.

### Advancing Industry Through Innovation and Execution

### Technology Services

## HBT Technology Services
HBT combines deep engineering expertise, industrial automation excellence, and data-driven innovation to help organizations build smarter, more efficient, and future-ready operations. We deliver end-to-end capabilities—from product engineering and embedded software to automation, data services, and lifecycle support—under one trusted partner.

Our approach blends real-world industry experience with scalable digital solutions to accelerate time-to-market and reduce operational risk. With a strong focus on quality, reliability, and long-term value creation, we help businesses optimize performance across the entire product and operational lifecycle. HBT is committed to delivering measurable impact, global standards, and sustainable growth for our customers.

### Our Services will be as Mentioned Below

#### Data as a Service (DaaS)
Unlock the full value of your business data with HBT’s end-to-end data solutions. We help organizations integrate, govern, and transform data into powerful insights that drive faster decisions, operational efficiency, and sustainable growth across the enterprise.

#### Automation and Software Solutions
HBT delivers advanced industrial automation and software solutions that improve productivity, reliability, and operational visibility across modern manufacturing and industrial environments. From embedded software and industrial control systems to validation and automation engineering, we help organizations design, build, and scale intelligent, connected systems.

#### Strategic Sourcing
Build resilient, cost-efficient supply chains that are ready for tomorrow’s challenges. HBT combines procurement expertise, analytics, and supplier intelligence to optimize sourcing strategies, reduce risks, and improve long-term supplier performance.

#### Strategic Product Suport
Maximize product value beyond launch with HBT’s comprehensive product support solutions. From CRM optimization to aftermarket and lifecycle services, we help organizations strengthen customer relationships, unlock new revenue streams, and extend product profitability.

#### Engineering Services
Accelerate innovation with HBT’s scalable engineering capabilities. From concept and design to validation and deployment, we help businesses develop reliable, high-performance products that reach the market faster and perform better.

#### Tech Documentation
Empower users and streamline operations with clear, compliant, and globally standardized technical documentation. HBT ensures your products are supported with accurate, structured, and easy-to-understand documentation that enhances usability and reduces operational risk.

### HBT Engineering
HBT [Hauhinco Bergbau Technik] subsidiaries and partner offices are strategically located in 15 countries including Australia, United States, China, Germany, India, Russia and headquartered in Luenen, Germany. It is a world class machine manufacturer and fully integrated single solution provider – specializing in systems and equipment for underground coal mining, Tunnelling, High Pressure Pumps, Control Systems, Drives & Motors.

HBT Engineering Private Limited, India is a company consisting of three primary departments that play a crucial role in supporting the Global HBT Group Business Technology services. These departments include Automation Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Global Product Support.
